_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. Never commit config.json to git.
_comment2: Get Reddit API credentials at: https://www.reddit.com/prefs/apps
_comment3: Create a 'script' type app. Use a fresh Reddit account for each ghost.
_comment4: Ghost Archetypes: lurker, commenter, power_user, newcomer, veteran, troll, helpful, casual
_comment5: Activity logging: actions are saved to action_logs/ directory
